svg.title: Два BI-проекта для портфолио — Аминский Сергей

text.tspan: Result: 42,000 rows from 3 sources — unified system for 25 users.
Report preparation: from 3 hours to 2 minutes. Input errors eliminated at architecture level.

g.text: Project 2 — Consolidation of 11 sources by building

svg.text: Power Query · ETL architecture · Excel · Power BI

g.text: Power Query — data unification and transformation
cleaning · normalization · key param extraction · matching by building
Design · Equipment · TP · Cost · Plan · As-built · Logs · Contractors
Manager sees summary and can open any source
Power BI — analytics layer and visualization
DAX measures · drill-down by building · interactive filters

text.tspan: Result: 573,000 rows from 11 sources — unified analytics system.
Summary report preparation: from 2 days to 30 minutes.
Management sees a live picture across all facilities without manual assembly or data loss.
